hero.title: Return to Your True Self
hero.lede: Structured retreat experiences for professionals, founders, serious practitioners and life-transition seekers who want space, rhythm and guided reconnection.

media.alt: Morning retreat practice mats prepared in a quiet courtyard near the mountains and river
media.caption: Morning practice space prepared before guests arrive.

items.title: International reassurance
items.copy: Travel, stay, food and safety clarity

items.title: Responsible wellness
items.copy: No cure or guaranteed transformation claims

intro.heading: A calmer way to begin again

paragraphs.text: Shreevan Wellness is for people who do not need more noise, pressure or quick fixes. They need space, structure, guidance and a clear rhythm that supports reconnection.
The experience is grounded in yoga, meditation, sattvic living, reflection and nature, while clearly distinguishing wellness education from medical advice.

programPathways.heading: Choose the depth of your reset
programPathways.copy: All programs matter. The 28-day immersive reset is the signature offer, but shorter pathways help guests enter at the right level of readiness.

items.title: 3-Day Ganga Sattva Reset
items.summary: Best for a short pause and reconnection.
items.outcome: A gentle return to breath, rhythm and perspective.

items.title: 7-Day Ganga Sattva Foundation
items.summary: Best for beginners who want structure and clarity.
items.outcome: A practical base for everyday wellness practices.

items.title: 14-Day Ganga Sattva Transformation
items.summary: Best for a deeper mind-body-emotional reset.
items.outcome: More time for practice, reflection and integration.

items.title: 28-Day Sattva Ganga Inner Awakening
items.summary: Best for a complete structured retreat experience.
items.outcome: A sustained reset with daily rhythm, guided practice and reflection.
items.label: Signature

items.title: 60-Day Rishi Tantra Conscious Living Residency
items.summary: Advanced residency for serious lifestyle reinvention.
items.outcome: A conscious living residency with mentoring, service and integration.
items.label: Advanced

differentiation.heading: Make the retreat feel real before the call

cards.title: Daily guided practice
cards.copy: Yoga, pranayama, meditation, Yoga Nidra and reflective practices.

cards.title: Structured daily rhythm
cards.copy: Practice, workshops, meals, rest, journaling and sharing circles.

cards.title: Sattvic meals
cards.copy: Simple vegetarian food with clear dietary guidance before arrival.

cards.title: Accommodation clarity
cards.copy: Room photos, privacy level, amenities and stay expectations should be shown.

cards.title: Integration support
cards.copy: Practical routines and tools that participants may continue after returning home.

cards.title: Responsible boundary
cards.copy: No cure claim, therapy substitute or guaranteed transformation promise.

rhythm.heading: A daily rhythm designed for clarity
rhythm.body: The day is intentionally paced between practice, learning, meals, rest and reflection. The experience should feel structured, not crowded.

team.heading: Trust starts with knowing who is holding the space
team.body: Add founder credentials, facilitator experience, training, guest-care standards and how suitability concerns are handled. This keeps trust personal without turning the page into a heavy "why us" block.

media.caption: Founder, lead facilitator or retreat team portrait

bullets.text: Years of practice and relevant training
Clear wellness boundaries and guest-care process

travel.heading: A guest travelling from abroad needs practical confidence
travel.body: The page should answer the questions a US, Canada or UK visitor will silently ask before booking a consultation.

cards.title: Airport and transfer guidance
cards.copy: Nearest airport, travel time, arrival window and transfer support.

cards.title: Accommodation and daily life
cards.copy: Rooms, bathrooms, climate, laundry, quiet hours, internet policy and packing.

cards.title: Sattvic meals explained plainly
cards.copy: Vegetarian food, caffeine, alcohol, spice level and dietary suitability.

cards.title: Suitability before payment
cards.copy: Goals, expectations, health context and whether the retreat is responsible for them.

location.heading: Trust increases when the place feels real
location.body: Replace placeholder content with verified location details, guest support flow, policies and real photography before launch.

media.alt: Quiet retreat courtyard with guest-care staff walking through the stay area
media.caption: Retreat courtyard and stay setting

cards.title: Where guests stay
cards.copy: Room options, privacy, cleaning and basic amenities.

cards.title: Who is available
cards.copy: On-site support and emergency contact process.

cards.title: What policies apply
cards.copy: Health disclaimer, refund policy and code of conduct.

testimonials.heading: Use specific proof, not generic praise

items.quote: The structure gave me space to slow down without feeling lost.
Add an international guest note about travel comfort, safety and support.
Add operational proof that the retreat is professionally managed.

consultation.heading: The consultation is the conversion point. Make it feel safe.
consultation.body: Visitors should understand that the call is not a sales trap. It is a responsible fit conversation before travel, payment or commitment.

steps.title: Understand your context
steps.copy: Goals, work pressure, travel plans, prior practice and current lifestyle.

steps.title: Check suitability
steps.copy: Health boundaries, retreat expectations, food, schedule and comfort with the rhythm.

steps.title: Recommend the next step
steps.copy: Program depth, booking path and what information you need before deciding.

leadForm.heading: Share a little context before we speak
leadForm.body: Keep this short. The goal is to route serious enquiries, understand country and program fit, and avoid asking for sensitive health details on the homepage.
